message:
fix(generator): remove double quotes from bash associative array keys

The previous fix only addressed hand-written lib scripts, but the
manifest generator was also producing double-quoted keys like:
  ["base.system"]="1"

With `set -u` (nounset), bash interprets ["base.system"] as a variable
reference and tries to expand $base, causing "unbound variable" errors.

Fixed the generator to produce unquoted keys:
  [base.system]="1"

This affects 6 associative array declarations in manifest_index.sh:
- ACFS_MODULE_PHASE
- ACFS_MODULE_DEPS
- ACFS_MODULE_FUNC
- ACFS_MODULE_CATEGORY
- ACFS_MODULE_TAGS
- ACFS_MODULE_DEFAULT

Added explanatory comment in generate.ts to prevent future regressions.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
